hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if any(x in p for x in ['.env','secret','credential']) else 0)"

FILE=$(cat | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
